The Hidden Cost of Technical Debt

How accumulated shortcuts silently drain engineering productivity

By Dr. Rebecca Stone · Premium

Technical debt is one of the most discussed yet least understood concepts in software engineering. Like financial debt, it compounds over time — but unlike financial debt, its interest rate is unpredictable and often hidden.

In a study of 500 engineering teams, we found that the average team spends 33% of development time dealing with technical debt. For teams with more than five years of legacy code, that number rises to...
